## DEC-001 - Exact Greeting Format

Status: accepted
Date: 2026-06-16
Owner: Example Owner

### Decision

The greeting command prints exactly:

```text
Hello, <name>.
```

### Why

The milestone needs one deterministic user-visible behavior that is easy to test.

### Applies To

- DEMO-1

### Spec Impact

No product spec update needed.
